title: Investors Look to Equal-Weight and Quality Factors in 2023
text: Investors are looking to the equal-weight and quality factors as they navigate a cloudy economic outlook. The Invesco S&P 500 Equal Weight Portfolio (RSP) and the Invesco S&P 500 Quality ETF (SPHQ) are Invesco's two most popular ETFs year-to-date, as measured by net flows.

title: Invesco to Close 26 ETFs in Shakeup of Its Listings
text: The shuttering products' combined assets total more than $1.4 billion.

title: Invesco Plans ETF Closures as It Refines Product Lineup
text: Invesco has planned ETF closures as the firm polishes its product lineup. According to recent regulatory filings, around 20 ETFs will be impacted by the firm's product refinement.

title: Invesco Real Estate Income Trust Inc. Closes on Mezzanine Loan for Warehousing Facility in Aurora, CO
text: DALLAS, Jan. 25, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Invesco Real Estate Income Trust Inc. ("INREIT"), an institutionally managed, public non-listed REIT, announced today the co-origination of a loan with Emigrant Bank, a New York State chartered bank, to Stonemont Financial Group ("Stonemont"), an Atlanta-based private real estate firm with $5.3 billion in assets under management. INREIT provided a $13 million mezzanine loan, together with Emigrant's $39 million senior loan, to finance Stonemont's acquisition of a distribution and warehousing facility in Aurora (Denver), Colorado.

title: Invesco Ltd. (IVZ) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Invesco Ltd. (NYSE:IVZ ) Q4 2022 Earnings Conference Call January 24, 2022 9:00 AM ET Company Participants Greg Ketron – Head-Investor Relations Marty Flanagan – President and Chief Executive Officer Allison Dukes – Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Glenn Schorr – Evercore Brian Bedell – Deutsche Bank Dan Fannon – Jefferies Brennan Hawken – UBS Craig Siegenthaler – Bank of America Alex Blostein – Goldman Sachs Bill Katz – Credit Suisse Patrick Davitt – Autonomous Research Mike Cyprys – Morgan Stanley Mike Brown – KBW Operator Welcome to Invesco's Fourth Quarter Earnings Conference Call.

title: Invesco (IVZ) Tops Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Invesco (IVZ) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 8.33% and 4.37%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Invesco (IVZ) Q4 Earnings & Revenues Beat, AUM Balance Down
text: Lower operating expenses support Invesco's (IVZ) Q4 earnings, while a decline in revenues and AUM balance poses undermining factors.

title: Invesco Advisers, Inc. Announces Increase in Monthly Distribution for Invesco Senior Income Trust
text: ATLANTA , Jan. 24, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Invesco Advisers, Inc., a subsidiary of Invesco Ltd. (NYSE: IVZ), announced today that the Board of Trustees (the "Board") of Invesco Senior Income Trust (NYSE: VVR) (the "Fund") approved an increase in the monthly distribution amount payable to common shareholders pursuant to the Fund's Managed Distribution Plan (the "Plan").

title: Invesco Reports Results for the Three Months and Year Ended December 31, 2022
text: Invesco Announces Fourth Quarter Diluted EPS of $0.41; Adjusted Diluted EPS(1) of $0.39 and Full Year 2022 Diluted EPS of $1.49; Adjusted Diluted EPS(1) of $1.68 ATLANTA , Jan. 24, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Invesco Ltd. (NYSE: IVZ) today reported financial results for the three months and year ended December 31, 2022.

title: Add Exposure to Semiconductor Stocks with These 2 Invesco ETFs
text: As semiconductor stocks surge on Monday, investors can look to two Invesco ETFs for semiconductor exposure. The Invesco PHLX Semiconductor ETF (SOXQ) and the Invesco Dynamic Semiconductors ETF (PSI) each offer exposure to the semiconductor industry.

title: 3 Asset Management Stocks Set to Pull Off Earnings Beat in Q4
text: Amid challenging operating environment and bearish investor sentiments, asset managers - Artisan Partners (APAM), Ameriprise (AMP) and Invesco (IVZ) - are set to outpace estimates in Q4.

title: Invesco's Clean Energy ETFs Rally in 2023
text: Invesco's clean energy ETFs are among its top-performing ETFs year-to-date. Invesco's broad clean energy fund, the Invesco WilderHill Clean Energy ETF (PBW), has gained 15.9% since January 1, while the Invesco Solar ETF (TAN) has increased 12.1% during the same period, according to ETF Database.

title: Activist Investors Make A Run At 9 Companies — Can You Score Too?
text: Fed-up activist investors are making a run for S&P 500 companies like Disney. Could this be the push needed to drive better returns?

title: Invesco Ltd. Announces December 31, 2022 Assets Under Management
text: ATLANTA , Jan. 11, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Invesco Ltd. (NYSE: IVZ) today reported preliminary month-end assets under management (AUM) of $1,409.2 billion, a decrease of 2.0% versus previous month-end.
